producercode.stakeJustification: HyCAM Solutions LLP is a team of expert research scientists, hydrographers, nautical cartographers, and GIS analysts with over 20 years of experience. We are a global provider of innovative hydrospatial products and services, specializing in high-quality geospatial and hydrographic solutions. producercode.agencyJustification:
AMSA is 
Australia’s national maritime safety regulator. We are responsible for the provision of NAVAREA 
X and AUSCOAST (coastal) navigational warnings. We also manage a network of about 480 marine 
aids to navigation (AtoN) located at about 360 sites around Australia’s coastline. Furthermore, 
SOLAS is implemented in Australia by the Navigation Act 2012 which establishes AMSA as the 
competent authority for VTS in Australia and allows regulations to be made in relation to VTS. 
We would therefore like to request a producer code (AU01) to produce S-124, S-201, S-129 and 
S-421 data products.
producercode.agencyRemark: We would also like to request to add S-125 to the list of products.

producercode.agencyJustification: As part of our institutional commitment to support the implementation of the IHO S-100 Universal Hydrographic Data Model, and in line with the progressive migration from S-57 to S-101 and other S-1XX product specifications, our organization requires a registered S-100 Data Producer Code. This code will allow us to ensure the traceability, quality assurance, and compliance of all future S-100 based products generated under our national mandate, in accordance with IHO Resolution 1/2007 as amended and the applicable guidance provided through the S-100 Working Group and RENC procedures.
